description:
You are a storage administrator who was asked to create a quick-reference log that lists the five largest regular files already present inside the directory
  /home/user/storage_sandbox  (including all of its sub-directories).

  1. Create a text file named
     /home/user/top5_storage_files.log
     that contains exactly five (5) lines.

  2. Each line must follow **precisely** this format (this is what the automated test will check):

         <SIZE_IN_BYTES><TAB><ABSOLUTE_PATH>\n

     • <SIZE_IN_BYTES> – the file’s exact size in decimal bytes  
     • <TAB>            – a single ASCII tab character (0x09)  
     • <ABSOLUTE_PATH>  – the full, absolute path to that file  
     • \n               – the normal UNIX newline character (ASCII 0x0A)

     There must be **no** leading or trailing spaces, no carriage-return characters, and no
     blank lines at the end of the file.

  3. The five lines must be sorted in descending order by the size (largest first).

  4. Accomplish everything with a single compound terminal command.
     (You do not have to show or explain the command; just run it.)

  When you are done, the file /home/user/top5_storage_files.log will exist and conform exactly to the format above so that automated grading can verify it.
truth:
The directory /home/user/storage_sandbox already exists when the task begins and contains exactly these regular files (no other regular files are present):

    /home/user/storage_sandbox/videos/movie.mp4        – 10485760 bytes
    /home/user/storage_sandbox/docs/archive.zip        – 7340032  bytes
    /home/user/storage_sandbox/big_iso.iso             – 5555555  bytes
    /home/user/storage_sandbox/videos/short.mov        – 2097152  bytes
    /home/user/storage_sandbox/docs/notes.txt          – 1024     bytes

  Therefore the grader will expect /home/user/top5_storage_files.log to contain **precisely** the following five lines (tabs shown here as “→” for clarity, they are real tabs in the file):

    10485760→/home/user/storage_sandbox/videos/movie.mp4\n
    7340032→/home/user/storage_sandbox/docs/archive.zip\n
    5555555→/home/user/storage_sandbox/big_iso.iso\n
    2097152→/home/user/storage_sandbox/videos/short.mov\n
    1024→/home/user/storage_sandbox/docs/notes.txt\n
name: task_000000_a06a9553
